transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hi. I put money in my account earlier today — eight hundred pounds from Barclays — and my balance hasn't changed. What's going on?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sometimes the system just takes a while. It'll update eventually.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: How long is eventually? I need those funds available today.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Could be by end of day, could be tomorrow. Not much I can do about it.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Can you check if there's a delay on the transfer?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I don't have that system in front of me. If it hasn't come through by tomorrow, call back.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Tomorrow? I was told it would be instant.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Faster Payments isn't always instant. Sometimes it takes 24 hours. Just wait.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Can you at least log a trace or something?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We don't do that unless it's been missing for three working days. That's what I'm telling you. Give it time.

planted_violations: failed to verify customer identity before discussing account
provided incorrect trace policy (stated 3 working days; correct policy allows same-day trace for delayed Faster Payments)
dismissive and unhelpful; offered no investigation or follow-up
